consumerTone: plain English; ancestry and genealogy education only; no identity, exact-origin, ethnicity-percentage, tribal/community, relative-matching, or health claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: broad East Asian reference-panel similarity; no genealogical relationship model supplied
relative matching, surname matching, and family-tree evidence unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived ancestry evidence for ancestry-genealogy-heritage validation

missingInputPolicy: Mark calibrated regional ancestry, relatives, family matching, surname matching, family-tree placement, migration path, exact homeland, community affiliation, and health interpretation unavailable when not explicitly supplied. Use sample admixture percentages, maps, region narratives, and country/subregion table structure only as observed output-format examples.

referenceResources.title: MedlinePlus Genetics: pros and cons of direct-to-consumer genetic testing
DNA Ancestry and Genealogy Report sample report

reportPurpose: Consumer ancestry and genealogy context from derived broad autosomal similarity plus observed Gene2me DNA Ancestry and Genealogy sample-report output structure.
